name: Gate Walkthrough Calibration
author: izicubed
description: Pre-flight walk-through calibration. Open a timed window (30 s by default, configurable) and have every pilot carry their powered-up quad through the gate over the timer: the plugin watches each seat's live RSSI, detects the pass peak and sets EnterAt/ExitAt for that seat automatically (applied to the node and saved in the current profile). Calibrations are remembered per pilot together with the channel they were made on — if a pilot's channel later changes (frequency edit, heat change, race staging) the plugin flags the seat and recommends a recalibration. Fully local: no network, no AI, works on any timer.
